title: Sugar's Tower Draws Near
description: Pages 16–20 focus on sugar's tower draws near, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Franky, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as franky, the Tontatta, and the Straw Hats push into the hidden factory network beneath Dressrosa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Guwahh!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The toy house is under attack...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Behehe don't pay that any mind!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: The Strawhat crew is going after the smile factory...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: And if they did happen to make it this far...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: You'd just turn them all into toys!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Behehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehe

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Nobody even knows about you!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Yup.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: under- ground passage.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Almost there now!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Captain!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: It seems that Fraland is Ram- paging over at the toy house!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I'll just take this opportunity to go wild, then!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I hope he's okay.

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: No reason to worry!! That guy is a super cyborg!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: But... just a moment ago, we received word that four of the family's officers...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Are standing guard at the toy house!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Officers!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: And it had to be the Diamante army!! Those guys are the battle Brigade!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: When it comes to fighting competi- Tions...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Those guys boast a 100% win rate.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: They're the big stars of the colos- Seum!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: SHWP...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: In other words, nobody really knows the true extent of their strength!!

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: Just how large is their main force, Leo!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Altogether, in this country there are 2,000 grunts...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: under the command of ten officers.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: And on top of that, con- trolling all of them are three elite officers.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Each of them controls an "army" of his own, each with a special char- actress!

dialogue.speaker: Trebol
dialogue.text: Trebollarmy (Special-ABill- Ties Team)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Dianante: A RmY(battle BRIGADE)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: We've also confirmed the existence of two others, outside of this country

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: Officer: Monet

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: Well... at least we're not going up against the battle bridge. Good luck, frankly!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: But in the end, all of them are really strong.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: What's up with that!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: hop

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: Step Step

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: Uwah!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: Thank you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: Not at all.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: Someone reason

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Sorry about that, usoland!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: We're here!! This is the underground world...

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: ...that holds both the commerce port and the factory!!!

summary: Sugar's Tower Draws Near focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Franky, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5 as franky, the Tontatta, and the Straw Hats push into the hidden factory network beneath Dressrosa.
